name: fred

metadata.name: fred
metadata.summary: St. Louis Federal Reserve FRED API

documentation:
Fred
====

Python wrapper of the St. Louis Federal Reserve Bank's [FRED API web
service](http://api.stlouisfed.org/docs/fred/) for retrieving economic data.

FRED API Documentation:
[http://api.stlouisfed.org/docs/fred/](http://api.stlouisfed.org/docs/fred/)

Sign up for a FRED API key:
[http://api.stlouisfed.org/api_key.html](http://api.stlouisfed.org/api_key.html)

modules.name: fred.api
documentation: Simplified functions for using the Fred API.

functions.name: fred.api.category
documentation: Get a category.
Category

functions.name: fred.api.categories
documentation: Just in case someone misspells the method.

functions.name: fred.api.children
documentation: Get child categories for a specified parent category.

functions.name: fred.api.related
documentation: Get related categories for a specified category.

functions.name: fred.api.category_series
documentation: Get the series in a category.

functions.name: fred.api.release
documentation: Get the release of economic data.
Releases

functions.name: fred.api.releases
documentation: Get all releases of economic data.

functions.name: fred.api.dates
documentation: Get release dates for economic data.

functions.name: fred.api.series
documentation: Get an economic data series.
Series

functions.name: fred.api.observations
documentation: Get an economic data series.

functions.name: fred.api.search
documentation: Get economic data series that match keywords.

functions.name: fred.api.updates
documentation: Get economic data series sorted in descending order.

functions.name: fred.api.vintage
documentation:
Get the dates in history when a series' data values were revised or new
data values were released.

functions.name: fred.api.source
documentation: Get a source of economic data.
Sources

functions.name: fred.api.sources
documentation: Get the sources of economic data.

modules.name: fred.core
documentation:
FRED API documentation: http://api.stlouisfed.org/docs/fred/

Core functionality for interacting with the FRED API.

classes.name: fred.core.Fred

methods.name: fred.core.Fred._create_path
documentation: Create the URL path with the Fred endpoint and given arguments.

methods.name: fred.core.Fred.get
documentation: Perform a GET request againt the Fred API endpoint.

methods.name: fred.core.Fred._get_keywords
documentation: Format GET request's parameters from keywords.

methods.name: fred.core.Fred._output
documentation: Return the output from a given GET request.

methods.name: fred.core.Fred.category
documentation:
Get a specific category.

```pycon
>>> Fred().category(category_id=125)
```

methods.name: fred.core.Fred.release
documentation:
Get a release of economic data.

```pycon
>>> Fred().release('series', release_id=51)
```

methods.name: fred.core.Fred.releases
documentation:
Get all releases of economic data.

```pycon
>>> Fred().releases('dates', limit=10)
```

methods.name: fred.core.Fred.series
documentation:
Get economic series of data.

```pycon
>>> Fred().series('search', search_text="money stock")
```

methods.name: fred.core.Fred.source
documentation:
Get a single source of economic data.

```pycon
>>> Fred().source(source_id=51)
```

methods.name: fred.core.Fred.sources
documentation:
Get all of FRED's sources of economic data.

```pycon
>>> Fred().sources()
```
An easy-to-use Python wrapper over the St. Louis FRED API.
